text: I am keenly aware of the contrast between the world outside this glass wall and the glowing, meticulously designed interior I am about to enter. The sterile, utilitarian corridors emphasize the artificial and purposeful ambiance within. There is a feeling of anticipation and curiosity; spaces shaped so intentionally invite me to contemplate the evolving relationship between technology, research, and human experience. I sense both the promise of discovery and the underlying unease of being observed by unblinking screens.
